He married the daughter of Hattusilis and signed a treaty with Hattusili after Mursilli III fled to his country. This ruler erected a temple to celebrate what he claimed was a victory over the Hittites at the Battle of Kadesh. He also dedicated the temple of Abu Simbel to his favorite wife.
